2025 Investment Themes: AI, Energy, Defense Redefine US Markets
data.description: 2025 outlook by Global X predicts U.S. competitiveness will drive portfolio growth. Infrastructure, defense innovation, automation, and energy independence are key themes to invest in.

data.title: This Water Utility Stock Trades At A Discount: Analyst
data.description: BofA Securities analyst initiates coverage on California Water with a Buy rating and $57 price target, highlighting its 17% upside potential and status as the cheapest US water utility amid strong competition and growing capital plans.

data.title: AnaptysBio Discontinues Investment In Eczema Candidate After Disappointing Data
data.description: AnaptysBio discontinues ANB032 for atopic dermatitis after a trial failure, refocusing on autoimmune assets with upcoming trial results in 2025-2026.
